title: Skydio CEO Adam Bry on why Silicon Valley shouldn’t draw red lines for drone use
summary: Skydio CEO Adam Bry discusses the company's focus on enterprise drone markets, including work with utility companies for infrastructure inspection and military applications. Following the Trump administration's ban on Chinese-made drones like DJI, Skydio faces reduced consumer competition and is expanding with AI-driven solutions. The interview explores Skydio's US manufacturing operations and responsible integration of AI in defense applications.
content:
Today, I’m talking with Adam Bry, who is CEO of Skydio, the leading US maker of autonomous drones. Before we recorded this episode, I actually got to remotely operate one of Skydio’s drones in the Bay Area from Adam’s laptop in our podcast studio in New York and fly an indoor drone around our office. You can check out the full video of that on our YouTube channel.
Beyond flying drones around the country, Adam and I talked about why Skydio is so focused on the enterprise market — I asked him a lot about working with police and military, but you’ll hear him say a lot of Skydio’s customers are utility companies that use drones to remotely inspect important infrastructure in ways that weren’t possible before. 



Verge subscribers, don’t forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Decoder wherever you get your podcasts. Head here. Not a subscriber? You can sign up here. 
That’s a big market, but it’s also one that was being served by cheap consumer drones in the past — products that basically no longer exist on the US market since most of them came from China, and the Trump administration banned foreign-made drones late last year. All those inexpensive DJI drones disappeared overnight, leaving expensive Skydio products as the main alternative.
Adam and I talked about all that and the reality of manufacturing complex products like drones in the United States. We also talked about Skydio’s work with the military and how Skydio’s use of AI lines up with defense work — I really wanted to know where Adam’s lines were, at a time when military use of AI is more controversial than ever. 
There’s a lot in this one — maybe more than anything, it was refreshing to hear Adam talk about using AI to bring even more people to work at Skydio as the company expands. And again, I got to fly the drones, which ruled. 
Okay: Adam Bry, CEO of Skydio. Here we go.


This interview has been lightly edited for length and clarity.
Adam Bry, you are the co-founder and CEO of Skydio. Welcome to Deco

zh.title: Skydio首席执行官Adam Bry谈硅谷为什么不应该对无人机使用划设限制
zh.summary: Skydio首席执行官Adam Bry讨论了公司在企业无人机市场的关注重点，包括与公用事业公司合作进行基础设施检测和军事应用。在特朗普政府禁止大疆等中国制造的无人机后，Skydio面临消费者竞争减少，并正在扩展以人工智能驱动的解决方案。采访探讨了Skydio的美国制造业务和在防御应用中负责任地整合人工智能的方式。

title: Sarvam becomes India’s newest AI unicorn with $234 million funding round led by HCLTech
summary: Sarvam, a Bengaluru-based AI startup, achieved unicorn status with a $234 million funding round led by HCLTech, India's largest IT services company, which is investing $150 million. The milestone reflects India's growing prominence in the AI sector and strengthens HCLTech's artificial intelligence capabilities.
content: Indian IT services company HCLTech is investing $150 million in the Bengaluru startup.

zh.title: Sarvam成为印度最新的人工智能独角兽，融资2.34亿美元由HCLTech领投
zh.summary: 总部位于班加罗尔的人工智能初创公司Sarvam通过由印度最大IT服务公司HCLTech领投的2.34亿美元融资轮取得独角兽地位，HCLTech投资1.5亿美元。这一里程碑反映了印度在人工智能领域日益增强的影响力，并强化了HCLTech的人工智能能力。

title: Fox to acquire Roku in $22 billion deal
summary: Fox is acquiring Roku in a $22 billion deal that will create the third-largest television company in the United States. The combined entity will merge Fox's TV networks and Tubi streaming service with Roku's streaming devices, smart TV software, and streaming channel.
content: Fox says the deal will create the third-largest television company in the United States.

zh.title: 福克斯以220亿美元收购Roku
zh.summary: 福克斯以220亿美元收购Roku，该交易将创建美国第三大电视公司。合并后的实体将整合福克斯的电视网络和Tubi流媒体服务与Roku的流媒体设备、智能电视软件和流媒体频道。

title: Google Earth’s flight simulator is now available in your browser
summary: Google has made its flight simulator feature—hidden in Google Earth since 2007—accessible through a web browser without requiring downloads or installation. Users can now easily access the virtual flying experience by opening Google Earth's website and navigating to the Flight Simulator tool from the top menu.
content:
On Friday Google announced it was making a relatively unknown feature of Google Earth available to a wider audience. The desktop version of Google Earth has had a hidden flight simulator mode since 2007, but it's now easily accessible through a web browser without having to download or install any apps.
To take to the virtual skies you'll need to open the Google Earth website and then click on the "Explore Earth" button found near the top right corner of the page. From there you'll find the "Flight Simulator" mode accessible as the last option in the Tool's section of the site's top menu bar. For the best experience you'll first want to fin …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 谷歌地球飞行模拟器现已可在浏览器中使用
zh.summary: 谷歌将其自2007年以来隐藏在谷歌地球中的飞行模拟器功能现已可通过网络浏览器访问，无需下载或安装。用户现在可以通过打开谷歌地球网站并从顶部菜单导航到飞行模拟器工具来轻松访问虚拟飞行体验。

title: As AI agents become employees, NewCore emerges with $66M to give them identities
summary: NewCore has raised $66 million to address enterprise security's next frontier: managing AI agents as they become embedded in workplace operations. The company argues that identity and security frameworks for AI agents will be as critical as traditional employee management.
content: NewCore argues the next challenge in enterprise security will be managing AI agents, not people.

zh.title: 随着人工智能代理成为员工，NewCore获得6600万美元融资为其提供身份
zh.summary: NewCore筹集了6600万美元，以解决企业安全的下一个前沿问题：管理嵌入到工作场所运营中的人工智能代理。该公司辩称，人工智能代理的身份和安全框架将与传统员工管理一样重要。

title: A satellite just learned to find things on its own — here’s what that means
summary: An Earth observation satellite achieved a historic milestone in April by autonomously discovering a target without human guidance, the first time a satellite has found what it was looking for on its own. This advancement demonstrates significant progress in autonomous satellite capabilities and AI integration in space technology.
content: In April, for the first time ever, an Earth observation satellite found what it was looking for, all on its own.

zh.title: 一颗卫星刚刚学会了自己寻找东西——以下是这意味着什么
zh.summary: 一颗地球观测卫星在4月实现了历史性里程碑，在没有人类指导的情况下自主发现了目标，这是卫星第一次找到了它一直在寻找的东西。这一进步表明了自主卫星能力和人工智能在太空技术中的整合方面的显著进展。

title: Fox is buying Roku
summary: Fox has announced its acquisition of Roku for $22 billion, creating the third-largest US television player by viewing share. The deal combines Fox's TV networks and Tubi streamer with Roku's device ecosystem and smart TV software, with Fox content receiving prominent placement on Roku platforms.
content:
Fox has announced that it's acquiring Roku outright, in a deal that values the streaming company at $22 billion. Once the deal is complete, Fox content will be promoted more heavily than before on Roku streamers and smart TVs.
The deal will see Fox's TV networks and Tubi streamer combine with Roku's network of streaming devices, smart TV software, and The Roku Channel. The companies say in a press release that by combining they'll become the third-largest player in the US TV industry by viewing share.
"This is a defining moment for Fox, and a natural extension of the deliberate and focused strategy we have been executing for nearly a decad …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 福克斯收购Roku
zh.summary: 福克斯宣布以220亿美元收购Roku，成为美国第三大电视播放平台。此次交易将福克斯的电视网络和Tubi流媒体与Roku的设备生态系统和智能电视软件相结合，福克斯内容将在Roku平台上获得显著的展示位置。

title: All the gear a 20-year gadget blogging veteran packs when traveling
summary: A travel writer with over 20 years of gadget blogging experience shares their refined packing checklist, evolved through trial and error to balance convenience, comfort, and connectivity. The curated selection emphasizes quality gear choices that differentiate between good and great travel experiences.
content:
Through more than two decades of travel for both work and leisure, my packing list has evolved from a random assortment of gadgets and accessories thrown together at the last minute into a refined checklist of gear honed by trial and error. The right packing list, I've found, can be the difference between a good trip and a great one. Or at least the difference between hectic trips to the local Best Buy and some extra time by the pool.
My family's summer vacation this year will involve lots of hiking and exploring the great outdoors, but it will by no means be an attempt to disconnect from our favorite devices. Convenience, comfort, and peac …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 20年资深科技博主的旅行打包清单
zh.summary: 一位拥有20多年科技博客经验的旅行作家分享了他精心编制的打包清单，经过多年试错演变而来，平衡了便利、舒适和连接性。这份精心策划的清单强调了优质装备选择对区分良好和优异旅行体验的重要性。

title: Honor’s Magic V6 sets three foldable firsts
summary: Honor's Magic V6 becomes the thinnest foldable phone yet with the largest battery and best water resistance in its category, though only the battery improvement feels meaningfully better than previous foldables. The device represents incremental progress as the foldable market matures, with new aspect ratios becoming key differentiators.
content:
The crease isn’t quite invisible, but otherwise this feels like the complete foldable package — on the hardware side at least.	

On paper, the Honor Magic V6 sounds like a tremendous leap forward for foldable phones: It's the thinnest one yet, with the biggest battery, and the best water-resistance ever. In practice, only the bigger battery feels like a meaningful improvement. The other upgrades are only fractionally superior to what came before.
This isn't entirely Honor's fault. It's getting harder to make a foldable phone stand out; even last year's offerings felt like complete flagship phones. Huawei's Pura X Max stood out for its odd new aspect ratio, which we're expecting to see both Samsung and Apple replicate later this year. Then there are the trifolds, whic …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 荣耀Magic V6创造三项折叠屏首创
zh.summary: 荣耀Magic V6成为迄今最薄的折叠屏手机，配备最大电池和同类最佳防水性能，但仅电池改进相比之前的折叠屏手机有明显改善。该设备代表了随着折叠屏市场成熟的增量进步，新的屏幕比例成为关键的差异化因素。

title: Under-16 social media ban announced by UK government
summary: The UK government announced a complete social media ban for children under 16 set to take effect in early 2026, following Australia's lead on similar legislation. The policy also restricts children from contacting strangers in games, livestreaming, and using romantic chatbots, responding to concerns about children's online safety.
content:
The UK is the latest country to follow Australia in implementing a total social media ban for children under 16, Prime Minister Keir Starmer has announced. The ban, which could take effect from early next year, will be joined by wider measures that will also prevent children from talking to strangers in online games, livestreaming, or using sexual or romantic chatbots.
"Do we truly believe that social media creates a happy environment for our children? Do we truly believe that it's a place where they can feel safe?" Starmer asked during a press conference announcing the policy. "I don't think I even need to answer those questions, do I?"
" …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 英国政府宣布16岁以下社交媒体禁令
zh.summary: 英国政府宣布了一项将于2026年初生效的16岁以下儿童全面社交媒体禁令，效仿澳大利亚的类似立法。该政策还禁止儿童在游戏和直播中与陌生人联系，以及使用浪漫聊天机器人，以应对儿童在线安全的担忧。

title: The AI layoff wave is becoming a powder keg
summary: Massive layoffs across the AI industry are creating a stark economic divide as thousands of workers lose jobs while a small group of AI insiders accumulate unprecedented wealth, potentially fueling social tension within the sector.
content: What makes this combustible: at the very moment that tens of thousands of workers are being shown the door, a small cohort of AI insiders is becoming wealthy on a scale that's hard to comprehend.

zh.title: AI行业裁员浪潮正成为一个火药桶
zh.summary: AI行业的大规模裁员正在造成经济分化，数千名工作者失业，而少数AI内部人士却积累了前所未有的财富，可能会加剧该行业内的社会紧张局势。

title: Orbio raises $21 million to automate hiring and onboarding for frontline workers
summary: Orbio closed a $21 million Series A funding round led by Dawn Capital to scale its platform automating hiring and onboarding workflows for frontline workers.
content: Orbio announces $21 Million Series A in round led by Dawn Capital.

zh.title: Orbio融资2100万美元用于自动化一线员工招聘和入职
zh.summary: Orbio完成由Dawn Capital领投的2100万美元A轮融资，用于扩展其自动化一线员工招聘和入职工作流程的平台。
